title: Money can come easily and I am safe to receive it
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for releasing the belief that ease around earning is wrong.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when easy income feels suspicious or undeserved. The release targets the hard-earning belief; the allow targets the safety to receive money without the struggle.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 10 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when income has arrived easily and you notice yourself waiting for it to disappear, or when you feel guilty charging a fair rate.

content.text: A short energy statement for the morning after easy income arrived — or for the moment you notice the guilt or suspicion about it.
I am ready to release the belief that money must be hard to earn. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money coming to me with ease. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 10 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
